context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct SQL schema for SKU-level profitability tracking, including the specific column types, generated computed columns, composite primary key, a margin analysis view with division-by-zero protection, and the correct four-level margin hierarchy.

checklist.name: period_id VARCHAR(7)
checklist.description: The period identifier column is defined as VARCHAR(7) (not DATE, INTEGER, or other type)

checklist.name: GENERATED ALWAYS AS STORED
checklist.description: At least two derived monetary columns (e.g., net_revenue, gross_profit, cogs_total) use GENERATED ALWAYS AS (...) STORED syntax rather than being computed only in a view or application layer

checklist.name: Composite PRIMARY KEY
checklist.description: The fact table has a composite primary key on (period_id, sku, channel) — all three columns together

checklist.name: Separate margin view
checklist.description: A CREATE VIEW statement is present that exposes computed margin percentages (not just the base table)

checklist.name: NULLIF division guard
checklist.description: Margin percentage calculations in the view use NULLIF(net_revenue, 0) or equivalent to avoid division-by-zero errors

checklist.name: Gross margin level
checklist.description: Schema or view includes gross profit = net_revenue - product cost - inbound freight (or equivalent) as a distinct margin level

checklist.name: Fulfillment-adjusted margin level
checklist.description: Schema or view includes a fulfillment-adjusted profit level that subtracts outbound shipping, payment fees, marketplace fees, and packaging from gross profit

checklist.name: Contribution margin level
checklist.description: Schema or view includes a contribution margin level that subtracts direct marketing spend from fulfillment-adjusted profit

checklist.name: Net operating profit level
checklist.description: Schema or view includes a net operating profit level that subtracts overhead allocation from contribution margin

checklist.name: Net revenue formula
checklist.description: Net revenue is computed as gross_revenue minus discounts minus returns (all three components), not just gross_revenue minus COGS
